summary: Iteration 16 Testing Complete - UI Refactor to Operational Control Center. All features verified: 3-section navbar (Dashboard, Pratiche, Comunicazione), Herion mascot logo, redesigned dashboard with KPIs, quick actions, practice table with run/approve controls, critical block, activity log, reminder banner. Backend priority engine and /run endpoint working. No toast spam on page load.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested the complete UI refactor to operational control center. All features verified working: (1) Navbar: 3 items only - Dashboard, Pratiche, Comunicazione. Herion mascot logo visible at /herion-mascot.png. User menu with Profilo and Esci (Control Room only for creator users). (2) Dashboard: KPI grid with Pratiche Attive, Attesa Approvazione (highlighted when >0), Completate, Urgenti. Quick actions: Nuova Pratica and Comunicazione buttons. Reminder banner with carousel. Practice table with Esegui button for draft practices and Approva button for waiting_approval practices. Critical block showing practices needing attention. Activity log with timestamps. (3) Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns all required fields including total_practices, pending, processing, waiting_approval, completed, blocked, urgent, high_priority, recent_practices, critical_practices, activity_logs. POST /api/practices/{id}/run endpoint works (calls AI orchestration). POST /api/practices/{id}/approve validates status correctly. Priority engine (evaluate_practice_priority) calculates correct levels based on status/risk/deadline. (4) Toast spam fix verified - no toast.error on page load for Dashboard, Practices, Email Center. (5) All UI text in Italian.

details: Only 3 nav items visible: Dashboard, Pratiche, Comunicazione
User menu opens with avatar click
Control Room NOT shown for admin user (correct - only for creator)
Displays client name, practice type, status badge, risk level, priority badge
Displays practices with waiting_approval, blocked, escalated status
Displays 8 recent activity entries with timestamps
Returns all required fields: total_practices, pending, processing, waiting_approval, completed, blocked, urgent, high_priority, recent_practices, critical_practices, activity_logs
No toast.error on Dashboard page load
No toast.error on Practices page load
No toast.error on Email Center page load
console.warn used for passive fetch failures
Login with admin@aic.it / Admin123! redirects to dashboard
